tooltip: Has a chance to apply and refresh all stacks of Mystified on you. Mystified lasts 15 seconds and reduces the cost of your Sorcery, Celestial, Darkness, and Infernal powers by 3%, stacking up to 3 times. Mystified is an Enchantment.

name: Mystical
tooltip: On a full maintain, applies and refreshes Mystical on you.

name: No Quarter
tooltip: Applies No Quarter to targets.

name: Power Shift
tooltip: Instead of Knocking targets back, targets are Knocked toward you.

name: Reckless Endangerment
tooltip: Has a 10% chance each hit to apply Recklesson you. If fully maintained and you have 3 stacks of Reckless, they are refreshed.

name: Reckless Endangerment
tooltip: The final combo hit applies Reckless to you.

name: Reckless Endangerment
tooltip: Using applies Reckless to you.

name: Single Minded
tooltip: Targets who are close have a chance to be Stunned.

name: Sudden Strike
tooltip: If you lunge from more than 50 feet away your next single target Melee Critical has 15% more severity. Sudden Strike is a Chi Energy effect.

name: Charged Up
tooltip: If consumes any Negative Ions, it applies Charged Up to you and affected allies. Charged Up increases your Running Speed by 15%, your Jump Height by 2%, and your Flying Speed by 2%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and lasts 10 seconds.

name: Magma Burst
tooltip: Deals an additional Fire damage to your primary target and secondary targets. Has a 45-100% chance to apply Clinging Flames to all targets.

name: Spitfire
tooltip: Increases the chance to apply Clinging Flames from 10% to 20%. Also guarantees the application of Clinging Flames to all targets hit when it is fully maintained.

name: Superconductor
tooltip: Fully charging applies Superconductor to the target.+ Superconductor reduces the target's resistance to Electrical damage by -18% for 12 seconds.

name: Sharp Edges
tooltip: Apply Bleed instead of Chill.

name: Sweltering Heat
tooltip: Has 10% chance to Snare targets. Roots them when fully maintained.

name: Hard Frost
tooltip: If fully maintained, Applies Hard Frost to targets.

name: Field Inversion
tooltip: If you are affected by a direct Shield effect, consumes the shield and deals additional Crushing Damage around your primary target. If any affected targets are affected by a Power Shield effect, deals Crushing damage to nearby targets.
